- Optimized for You
Odos turns complexity into value - searching millions of routes to deliver the most tokens for your trade.

Integrate with Odos APIs
Trading
Your Trading, Your Way
Effortless swaps, flexible strategies, and full control—trade your way with Odos.
Simple Swap
Get guaranteed quotes and swap tokens seamlessly without worrying about complex settings. What you see is what you get.
Learn more
Limit Orders
Put your trades on autopilot. Watch them execute only when your target price is met. Flexible and precise for advanced strategies.
Learn more
Advanced Swap
Take full control of your trades with customizable settings, including gas, slippage, and liquidity sources.
Learn more
Value
The Odos
Advantage
Easily and securely trade any token while enjoying better rates, lower fees, and transparent quotes—made possible by Odos’ advanced routing.
Best Rates, Every Time
Maximize your token output by splitting trades across hundreds of liquidity sources with Odos.
Access to More Tokens
Explore and trade everything. From blue-chip tokens to long-tail assets, memecoins, and more.
Market Arbitrage Included
Capture hidden value unlocked by routing through intermediary tokens along your trade route.
Complex Routing, Simplified
Leverage the most sophisticated algorithm for optimizing your trades with only a few clicks.
Minimize Fees, Maximize Value
Reduce overall liquidity source fees, network gas costs, and more - automatically with Odos’ optimization.
Multiple Tokens, One Transaction
Streamline your trades by rebalancing or liquidating entire portfolios of tokens with only a single transaction.
Developers
Build Powerful
Solutions with
Odos APIs
Partner with Odos to bring advanced token swaps, liquidity aggregation, and other powerful tools directly to your users.
Smart Order Routing API
Bring Odos’ best-in-class routing to your platform, ensuring users get the most tokens for their trades.
Token Pricing API
Build with real-time pricing data to power smarter trading decisions and create more rich applications.
Liquidity Zaps
Simplify deposits and withdrawals into liquidity pools with single-click solutions.
Route Visualization
Show users exactly how trades are routed with our Sankey diagram.
